channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Authorities Intensify Inspections of Granite Quarries in North Kerala over Explosives Safety
item.description: Following the National Investigation Agency's (NIA) raids at multiple locations across north Kerala last week, local authorities have intensified surveillance on granite quarries in Malappuram, Kozhik...

item.title: PVL expects no impact despite PNVF suspension, says Ricky Palou
item.description: Ricky Palou has expressed confidence that the recent suspension involving the Philippine National Volleyball Federation (PNVF) will not negatively affect the operations of the Premier Volleyball Leagu...

item.title: Alexa Demie denies retirement plans and explains selective approach to acting roles
item.description: Alexa Demie, widely recognised for her role as Maddy Perez in HBO’s Euphoria, has firmly denied rumours suggesting she plans to retire from acting after the show’s third season. The speculation appear...

item.title: DK Shivakumar says Bengaluru fans missed IPL final as RCB clinches second consecutive title
item.description: Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) successfully defended their IPL title on Sunday by defeating Gujarat Titans by five wickets at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad. Powered by Virat Kohli's record...

item.title: 18-year-old Sri Lankan Tamil woman killed in alleged gang-related road rage attack on Chennai’s Koyambedu flyover
item.description: An 18-year-old Sri Lankan Tamil woman, Yancy, was killed in a violent incident on the Koyambedu flyover in Chennai on Saturday night after a group of men allegedly turned a personal altercation into a...

item.title: Study finds chimpanzees and bonobos form layered social networks similar to human friendship circles
item.description: A new international study led by researchers from Utrecht University and Universidad Carlos III de Madrid suggests that chimpanzees and bonobos organize their social relationships in ways that closely...

item.title: Simba SC Clinches Women’s Premier League Title with 5–2 Win Over Mashujaa
item.description: Simba SC has officially been crowned champions of the Women’s Premier League (WPL) in Tanzania after delivering a strong and convincing 5–2 victory against Mashujaa FC. The decisive match confirmed Si...

item.title: Trump praises Giants quarterback Jaxson Dart and comments on his potential
item.description: During a recent appearance on 'My View with Lara Trump,' former President Donald Trump spoke highly of New York Giants quarterback Jaxson Dart. Trump described Dart as handsome and conservative, notin...

item.title: First CRL trainset delivered in Singapore as MRT project advances toward 2030 launch
item.description: The first trainset for Singapore’s upcoming Cross Island Line (CRL) has arrived in the country, marking a key milestone in the development of the nation’s newest MRT line. According to the Land Transp...

item.title: Jill Biden discusses Joe Biden's health and prostate cancer diagnosis
item.description: Jill Biden has spoken candidly about her husband, President Joe Biden's health, acknowledging that he had been 'slowing down' towards the end of his presidency. Despite this, she defended his mental f...

item.title: Kidunda Dam project reaches 50.3% completion as government reports major progress on water supply initiative
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has announced that the Kidunda Water Dam project has reached 50.3 percent completion, marking significant progress in one of the country’s major water infrastructure develop...

item.title: South Africans shine in Rabat Diamond League with Dambile podium and Tshite top African in 1500m
item.description: South African athletes put in strong performances at the Diamond League meet in Rabat on Sunday. Sinesipho Dambile made an impressive return from injury, finishing third in the 200m in his Diamond Lea...

item.title: World Bank Supports Developing Countries to Use Minerals for Jobs and Sustainable Growth
item.description: The World Bank Group is now helping countries rich in minerals to use their resources for long-term growth instead of just selling them raw. Many developing nations with abundant minerals like cobalt,...

item.title: Bauchi Governor Clarifies Political Plans, Affirms Senate Ambition with APM
item.description: Bauchi State Governor, Senator Bala Mohammed, don sharply dismiss all rumours wey dey circulate say him wan leave Allied Peoples Movement (APM) make him join Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) as former P...

item.title: One dead, another seriously injured in Werribee house fire under investigation
item.description: A person has died and another remains in hospital with serious injuries following an early morning house fire in Melbourne’s western suburbs. Emergency services were called to a property on Newbury St...

item.title: Bafana Bafana to travel to the US for FIFA World Cup after visa issues cleared
item.description: Bafana Bafana is finally set to depart for the United States after visa complications caused a delay in their journey for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The South African national football team was original...

item.title: Pakistani Youth Crosses LoC in Uri to Meet Local Woman, Detained by Army
item.description: In a surprising development in north Kashmir's Uri sector, the Indian Army apprehended a 22-year-old man from Pakistan-occupied Kashmir (PoK) who had crossed the Line of Control (LoC). The intruder, i...

item.title: Love Island USA dismisses Vasana Montgomery after resurfaced racist videos
item.description: Love Island USA has removed Vasana Montgomery, 25, from its upcoming eighth season following the circulation of videos showing her using the n-word. The videos, which were privately shared and not rev...

item.title: Government Responds to Counterfeit Currency Case in Manyoni District
item.description: A Tanzanian government official has publicly expressed deep concern after reports emerged about counterfeit currency being produced in Manyoni district, Singida Region. The minister urged all involved...

item.title: Third Annual McHugh Bluffs Stair-Climbing Fundraiser Raises Support for Military Families
item.description: The article reports on the third annual stair-climbing fundraiser held at McHugh Bluffs in Calgary, where participants gathered to test their endurance while raising awareness and financial support fo...
